memory.summary: I have a free afternoon and low energy, so attending the leisure event seems like a good way to relax before tackling the term project later.
Procrastinating on the term project compounds future stress; I must work now to avoid crunch time later.
Working 2 hours increased project progress from 0.28 to 0.47, confirming that immediate effort reduces future stress despite current low energy.
Working 2 hours boosted progress to 0.61, confirming early effort mitigates future stress despite current fatigue.
Two more hours brought progress to 0.70, confirming immediate work effectively mitigates future stress despite my fatigue.
I worked 2 hours to improve project progress, but missed a trivial chore deadline. Despite high fatigue and stress, the work effort seems effective so far.
One hour of work increased project progress to 0.82, reinforcing that immediate effort effectively mitigates future stress despite my current fatigue.
After sleeping 3 hours, my energy slightly dropped but remained stable. Recent work efforts continue to effectively mitigate stress despite fatigue.
Working 2 hours further boosted project progress to 0.96, confirming that sustained effort effectively reduces stress despite current fatigue levels.
The project is now complete, confirming that sustained effort successfully mitigated stress despite fatigue.
A trivial task completed early this morning, further confirming that even small efforts help manage stress despite fatigue.
The term project is fully complete, and my stress remains high despite zero sleep debt. I have no further work tasks to perform.
